title: dryoathyrium boryanum
intro: Dryoathyrium boryanum, also known as Bory's lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving respiratory health, and providing relief from digestive issues. Dryoathyrium boryanum is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in capsule form, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
